case_results.comment: The core route claims are fully supported: Tokyo Monorail to Hamamatsucho, then JR Yamanote Line to Shibuya, over 23.0 km in about 40 minutes (2400 seconds). “Comfortable” is non-core commentary and does not affect grounding.

case_results.comment: The core route claims are supported: the mode is bicycle, the distance is 3.1 km, the 840-second duration equals 14 minutes, and Prinsengracht appears in the route steps. “Lovely canal views” is an unsupported non-core commentary, so this is an essentially grounded answer with one minor slip.
